title: Saccolabium retusum
taxonomy: Saccolabium retusum is a species of orchid. It belongs to the family Orchidaceae. The genus Saccolabium is a subgenus of the genus Dendrobium, which is a part of the tribe Dendrobieae. Dendrobieae is a subtribe within the subfamily Epidendroideae. The classification of Saccolabium retusum reflects its evolutionary relationships within the orchid family.

intro: Saccolabium retusum, also known as the retuse Saccolabium, is a species of orchid found in tropical Asia. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, and its health benefits include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The bioactive constituents of Saccolabium retusum include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
